blocks.headline: Ship product 2x faster without burning out your team
blocks.sub: The Ship-Faster Playbook distills how 40+ high-velocity teams scope, build, and release — the exact rituals, checklists, and anti-patterns. Drop your email and we'll send it straight to your inbox.

items.d: Copy-ready planning, review, and release rituals you can roll out next sprint — no consultant required.
The scope creep, review bottlenecks, and hand-off gaps that quietly add weeks — and exactly how to dodge each one.
After the guide you'll get one short, high-signal email a week. Unsubscribe in a click, anytime.

blocks.html:
Send me the free guide

Enter your email and we'll deliver The Ship-Faster Playbook instantly.
blocks.css: .lc-capture{display:flex;justify-content:center;padding:64px 20px}.lc-card{width:100%;max-width:520px;text-align:center;padding:40px;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(120,90,255,.18)}.lc-card h2{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:1.6rem}.lc-card p{margin:0 0 24px;opacity:.8}.lc-card form{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}.lc-card input{flex:1 1 220px;min-width:0;padding:14px 16px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);color:inherit;font-size:1rem}.lc-card button{padding:14px 22px;border:0;border-radius:12px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c5cff,#22d3ee);color:#0b0b16}.lc-card button:disabled{opacity:.6;cursor:default}.lc-msg{margin:16px 0 0;min-height:1.2em;font-weight:600}.lc-msg.ok{color:#34d399}.lc-msg.err{color:#fb7185}
blocks.js: (function(){var f=document.getElementById('lc-form');if(!f)return;var emailEl=document.getElementById('lc-email');var btn=document.getElementById('lc-submit');var msg=document.getElementById('lc-msg');f.addEventListener('submit',function(e){e.preventDefault();var email=(emailEl.value||'').trim();msg.className='lc-msg';if(!email||email.indexOf('@')<1){msg.textContent='Please enter a valid email address.';msg.className='lc-msg err';return;}btn.disabled=true;var orig=btn.textContent;btn.textContent='Sending…';fetch('/api/data/leads',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email:email})}).then(function(r){if(!r.ok)throw new Error('bad status');return r.json();}).then(function(){f.reset();msg.textContent='Thanks! Check your inbox — your guide is on the way.';msg.className='lc-msg ok';btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false;}).catch(function(){msg.textContent='Something went wrong. Please try again.';msg.className='lc-msg err';btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false;});});})();

blocks.text: © Ship It Weekly · We respect your inbox — unsubscribe anytime · Privacy
